TutorConnect
Subjects Find a Tutor Pricing Results
Subjects Find a Tutor Pricing Results
Expert Online Tutoring

Get Expert Help Anytime

Connect with certified tutors for K-12 subjects. 1-on-1 personalized learning at your pace.

Certified Tutors

Qualified professionals with backgrounds

Flexible Scheduling

Book lessons whenever it works for you

Tutoring for All Subjects

From elementary through high school, we cover all major subjects

📐

Mathematics

Algebra, Geometry, Calculus, SAT/ACT Math

  • Grade 3-12
  • Test prep
  • 250+ tutors
📚

English & Writing

Literature, Essays, Grammar, SAT/ACT English

  • Grade 3-12
  • Essay coaching
  • 200+ tutors
🧪

Science

Biology, Chemistry, Physics, AP Sciences

  • Grade 3-12
  • Lab help
  • 180+ tutors
🌍

Languages

Spanish, French, German, Chinese, Japanese

  • Grade 3-12
  • Conversational
  • 150+ tutors
📜

History & Social Studies

World History, US History, AP exams

  • Grade 3-12
  • Essay help
  • 120+ tutors
💻

Computer Science

Programming, Python, Java, Web Development

  • Grade 6-12
  • Project help
  • 100+ tutors
🎨

Arts & Music

Visual Arts, Music Theory, Piano, Guitar

  • All ages
  • Instrument lessons
  • 80+ tutors
🎯

Test Prep

SAT, ACT, GRE, GMAT, AP Exams

  • Expert coaches
  • Score guarantee
  • 160+ tutors

Meet Our Expert Tutors

Maria Rodriguez

Math & Science Specialist

5+ years teaching experience. Specializes in SAT/ACT prep. 98% of students improve their scores.

David Chen

Computer Science Expert

Software engineer teaching coding to K-12. 200+ students taught. Expert in Python & Java.

Jessica Martinez

English & Essay Coach

Published author. Helps students with essays, creative writing & SAT/ACT reading.

Simple Pricing

Pay Per Lesson

$25-50

per 50-minute lesson

  • No subscription
  • Choose any tutor
  • Flexible scheduling
  • Money-back guarantee
Popular

Monthly Subscription

$199

8 lessons/month

  • $24.88 per lesson
  • $100 discount annually
  • Dedicated tutor
  • Priority booking

Intensive Prep

$699

SAT/ACT Prep (10 weeks)

  • 20 lessons included
  • Expert test coach
  • Full study materials
  • Score improvement guarantee

Proven Results

92%

Student satisfaction rate

+2.1

Average GPA improvement

+150

Average SAT score increase

500K+

Lessons completed

"My SAT score jumped from 1200 to 1380 in just 8 weeks! The tutors here are amazing and really know how to explain difficult concepts. Highly recommend!"

Alex Johnson, High School Junior

"As a parent, I love how flexible TutorConnect is. My daughter can book lessons around her soccer schedule. She went from a C to an A in algebra!"

Sarah Williams, Parent

Ready to Improve Your Grades?

Book your first lesson today and see the difference expert tutoring can make.
